text:
is a fictional song by Earth Defense Band. It was featured in the Neon Genesis Evangelion game.

It was released on 01 March 1996 in the same CD as the game. The song would be re-released in a separate CD in 2005, the SEGA Saturn History ★ Vocal Collection https://vgmdb.net/album/2077 . However this version was not sung by Junko Iwao and is uncredited. Junko Iwao sung a new version on Junko Iwao's Sweet Tweet Time radio program broadcast on 21 May 2011. https://www.weblio.jp/content/%E5%A5%87%E8%B7%A1%E3%81%AE%E6%88%A6%E5%A3%AB%E3%82%A8%E3%83%B4%E3%82%A1%E3%83%B3%E3%82%B2%E3%83%AA%E3%82%AA%E3%83%B3
